recipe.title: Wednesday: Spaghetti and Meatballs
steps: Bring large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti per package until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
In large skillet, add marinara sauce. Simmer over medium heat 5 min. Add meatballs, cover and cook 10–12 min, turning occasionally, until heated through.
Toss drained spaghetti with sauce. Add pasta water as needed to loosen.
Serve topped with meatballs, fresh basil, Parmesan.
